Description: Defines a single Lambda function, its IAM execution role (retrieved from IAM stack), and CloudWatch Log Group. This stack is intended to be nested for each Lambda function.

ProjectName.Description: The name of the project. Used for naming resources.

BranchName.Description: The name of the branch this stack is for. Used for naming resources and S3 paths.

FunctionName.Description: The specific name of this function (e.g., 'hello', 'contact-form'). Used for naming resources and S3 paths.

LambdaHandler.Description: The handler for the Lambda function (e.g., 'index.handler').

LambdaRuntime.Description: The runtime for the Lambda function (e.g., 'nodejs20.x').

StaticAssetsS3BucketName.Description: The S3 bucket where the Lambda code is stored.

LambdaExecutionRoleArn.Description: ARN of the IAM Role for Lambda execution.

LambdaFunctionArn.Description: ARN of the created Lambda function

LambdaFunctionName.Description: Name of the created Lambda function
